site.name: Global Boba Graph
site.tagline: Global bubble tea knowledge & industry media
site.description: Discover bubble tea brands, cities, drinks and industry news from around the world. Structured, searchable, and built for both enthusiasts and the trade.

home.headline: A structured data platform for bubble tea brands, cities, drinks and news worldwide.
home.lede: Starting as an SEO content database, growing into a knowledge graph, AI search and industry intelligence product.
home.scaffold_note: Day 1 scaffold complete. Next: model the data-model.md schema and seed a vertical slice.
